title: *SOLD* Lot in El Zonte, Walking Distance To Private Beach, $350,000
location_text: El Zonte, La Libertad
description: If you are looking for a property in El Zonte, walking distance to the beach, this is it! This property is absolutely perfect for building a private vacation home or small project (for examples a few casitas or apartments) to rent or sell. This property is just a 3-minute walk from ‘La Privada’ a private beach that connects to El Zonte’s public beaches. It currently features older structures and a pool that needs refurbishing. This is a rare find at a very accessible price.

title: *SOLD* 1.15 Acres of Oceanview Land in KM59
location_text: K59, La Libertad
description: If you’re looking for an accessible ocean view opportunity in an up-and-coming area that is close to the surf break… we’ve got just the opportunity for you. This rustic piece of land is over an acre in size, and offers 180-degree ocean views over the renowned KM59 surf break. The land is slopped but not too steep, allowing for spectacular views from multiple vantage points.It is perfectly situated — a prime, prime, prime location! The property sits just off of the CA-2 Litoral, and will soon be accessible via private road. The road is currently under development and will allow for easy access to the land. Access to water and electricity is possible.The property is just a short ten-minute drive from the popular town of El Zonte and approximately an hour from the capital of San Salvador.This is a great opportunity for a private residence or Airbnb — or to purchase and subdivide with friends.

title: *SOLD* Tamanique Oceanview Business Opportunity
location_text: Tamanique, La Libertad
description: Investment opportunity just a few steps away from the famous El Tunco beach and surf. A 4-bedroom, 2-bathroom ocean view house that is currently operating as a surf hostel in one of the most sought-after destinations for travelers and surfers on the coast of La Libertad. Just walking distance in El Tunco, you will find night and weekend activities such as bars, nightclubs, and restaurants to enjoy.

title: *SOLD* Vacant, Oceanview Land in Tamanique
location_text: Tamanique, La Libertad
description: Vacant land for sale in Surf City 1. Featuring a 180 degree oceanview, this property offers a variety of possibilities, whether for building your beach home or for business purposes, such as Airbnb. This land is located just 3 minutes away from the world-famous El Tunco Beach, known for its variety of day and night activities. From San Salvador to this property, it takes a 35-minute drive.

title: El Zonte
location_text: El Zonte is 45 minutes from San Salvador and the San Salvador International airport.
description: El Zonte is a small beach town with a welcoming local community and year-round surf. With enough time you’ll come to know everyone by face and name, from the local fisherman to small business owners. This little paradise is truly magical — offering breathtaking views of the ocean, sunset and lush mountain scapes. Get involved with one of the open-to-all beach workouts, enjoy traditional eats from the local pupuseria and improve your surf skills on either the right, and/or left breaks. El Zonte is one of the most coveted locations for residential or rental property!

title: Xanadú
location_text: Xanadú is 45 minutes from San Salvador and the San Salvador International airport.
description: Xanadú is located on the coast of El Salvador and is part of Surf City. One of the most exclusive and secure private beach communities, Xanadú offers easy beach access and is just 5 minutes (by car) to El Tunco. This location is absolutely beautiful — one of the most coveted gated communities for residential or rental property!

title: Sol Y Mar
location_text: Xanadú is 45 minutes from San Salvador and the San Salvador International airport.
description: Sol Y Mar is located on the coast of El Salvador and is part of Surf City. Sol Y Mar is a private, gated community with easy beach access and is just 5 minutes (by car) to El Tunco. This location is less developed than some of the other private communities along the coast. It’s quiet, with exceptional views and opportunities for development for both rental and residential homes.

title: San Blas
location_text: San Blas is 45 minutes from San Salvador and the San Salvador International airport.
description: San Blas is a private, gated community located on the sandy and popular San Blas beach. This location is one of the most popular spots on the coast of El Salvador. The residential community is safe, with 24/7 security, and the proximity to the beach means easy access to affordable local seafood spots and more. If you’re a surfer or looking to invest in Surf City, San Blas is a great option for a personal home or Airbnb business.

title: Tunco
location_text: El Tunco is 45 minutes from San Salvador and the San Salvador International airport.
description: Of all the coastal towns in El Salvador’s Surf City, Tunco is the most touristy. It is located about 15 minutes from La Libertad and about 45 minutes from San Salvador. Tunco is home to boutique hotels, great restaurants, surf breaks (Sunzal and La Bocana) as well as party spots. If you’re looking to invest in hospitality or any other storefront, Tunco is busy with foot traffic, locals and foreigners.

title: Cerromar
location_text: Cerromar is 45 minutes from San Salvador and the San Salvador International airport.
description: Cerromar is a private, gated community on the coast of El Salvador. With 24/7 security and close access to Sunzal, one of the best local surf breaks, Cerromar is one of the most coveted locations for residential or rental property!

title: Atami
location_text: Atami is about 50 minutes driving from San Salvador and about an hour from the San Salvador International airport.
description: Atami is a private, gated community located on the coast of El Salvador. It is about 20 minutes driving from La Libertad and about 50 minutes from San Salvador. Atami has 24/7 security, a beautiful beach club with multiple restaurants and a wonderful community of families. Atami is a very popular location for residential or rental property.

title: El Palmarcito
location_text: El Palmarcito is 45 minutes from San Salvador and the San Salvador International airport.
description: El Palmarcito is a small beach town located about 20 minutes from La Libertad and about 50 minutes from San Salvador. Palmar is home to boutique hotels, great restaurants, a right and left surf break as well as incredible scenery and beach access. If you’re looking to for a residential or rental opportunity walking distance from the beach, Palmar is a great option.

description: This modern home is located in Cerromar, one of the most exclusive gated communities on the coast of El Salvador. New construction, featuring a fully furnished main house with ocean view as well as smaller, fully furnished, casitas for guests or rental income (instant cash flow, $2,000 monthly). This property is ready-to-go, the perfect option for a family (permanent or vacation property) or to rent. About an hour from the airport and downtown San Salvador. 5 minutes to Sunzal & La Bocana, 15 minutes to El Zonte and 20 minutes to the world-class Punta Roca surf break where they hold the 7th stop on the WSL tour.

title: Cliffside apartments in El Zonte

title: Las Luces Gated Community (Lots Available in the 6th Phase)
location_text: Las Luces, La Libertad road, Km 21, Zaragoza, La Libertad
description: Residencial Las Luces is perfect for those who are looking to live in a middle ground between the urban side of La Libertad and the coastal side. Las Luces is one of the finest residential areas in La Libertad, situated approximately 10 minutes away from El Tunco beach. It boasts amenities such as parks, tennis courts, gyms, nature trails, and a clubhouse with an event hall. This is the ideal place to build the house of your dreams.

title: Land in El Zonte (Bitcoin Beach)
location_text: El Zonte, Tamanique, La Libertad, El Salvador
description: Vacant lot in El Zonte, also known as Bitcoin Beach, a highly-popular, but still charming, tourist destination for foreign travelers. This lot is just minutes walking from town and world-class waves. This is your opportunity to invest in Bitcoin Beach.

title: Land in Complejo El Mirador, Surf City 1
location_text: Complejo El Mirador, Conchalío, La Libertad, El Salvador
description: Vacant lot in Complejo El Mirador, a popular gated community with incredible ocean views, located in Surf City 1. The location is ideal for easy access to San Salvador, just a 20-30 minute drive away, as well as easy access to the beach and local surf breaks. A remarkable opportunity whether for investment purposes like AirBnB or for your dream vacation home. There is a lot of development in this particular area.

title: House / Land at Ilopango Lake
location_text: Ilopango Lake, San Salvador, El Salvador.
description: Incredible property located at Ilopango lake, big land and house ready for your vacation home or future hotel opportunity, more than 100 meters of front lake property. Ilopango is the second-largest lake in El Salvador, and it is just 30 minutes away from San Salvador city. In the lake you can practice a wide variety of water sports, like kayaking, jet skiing and boating. The lake’s shoreline offers restaurants with spectacular views like the Panoramic view, which has a variety of gastronomic options.

title: *SOLD* 4-Bedroom House in Atami Gated Community, $340,000
location_text: Atami, private community
description: Located in a private residential community, this remodeled two-level home offers generous interior spaces and a practical, fully move-in-ready layout. With four bedrooms and three bathrooms, the home features bright social areas that open directly onto a spacious outdoor terrace, creating an easy flow for everyday living or hosting. Large windows throughout bring in abundant natural light, while the backyard adds extra green space for relaxation or family use.Designed for functional, modern living, the property sits within a community that offers access to restaurants, the private beach at La Leona, and El Palmarcito beach. A solid option for those seeking comfort, convenience, and coastal lifestyle in a secure residential environment.

title: 3 Villas Complex in Costa del Sol, $1,200,000

The complex featuresthree brand-new homes, each fully furnished, equipped, and only a 2-minute walk from the beach. Every unit offers a modern design, spacious interiors, and all the comforts ideal for both vacation living and investment.Currently managed as independentAirbnb rentals, the homes generate impressive returns—each earning up to$6,000 per monthduring high season, with a combined potential of$18,000 monthly. Its prime location, natural surroundings, and proven business model make this a standoutturnkey investmentin one of El Salvador’s most desirable coastal destinations.
